title: ASIC flags disclosure flaws in first wave of mandatory climate reports
full_text:
Press space to play

ERR_INTERNET_DISCONNECTED
summary: The Australian Securities and Investments Commission (ASIC) has identified issues in the first set of mandatory climate reports from companies, highlighting problems with how they disclose climate-related risks and impacts. This could affect investors' understanding of companies' environmental practices.
heading: Regulation
key_points: ASIC reviewed initial climate reports from companies.
Found flaws in risk and impact disclosures.
Issues may mislead investors about environmental practices.
ticker_line: ASIC raises concerns over climate report disclosures
